title: Confirmation dialog component with customizable buttons
purpose: Provides a reusable UI component for displaying confirmation dialogs with customizable message, button labels, and actions.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named Confirmation that accepts props for handling confirmation and cancellation actions, with support for different confirmation types and accessibility attributes.

steps.content: Generate a unique identifier for the component instance.
Construct an ID for the message element using the generated identifier.
Determine the labels for confirm and cancel buttons based on the confirmation type.
Render a container div with appropriate ARIA attributes and styling.
IF a message is provided, render it as a paragraph with the constructed message ID.
Render a button group containing cancel and confirm buttons with appropriate styling and event handlers.
Set the button labels and ARIA labels based on the confirmation type and props.
Apply disabled state and styling to both buttons when the disabled prop is true.
